name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: 318-320 Cedar Ave in Pittsburgh, PA is home to Western Union Money Order Only, a dedicated money order service location.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only is located at 318-320 Cedar Ave in Pittsburgh, PA, offering a straightforward solution for residents and visitors who need reliable money order services. This standalone facility operates seven days a week from 8 AM to 8 PM, making it accessible during extended hours across the entire week. The location serves Pittsburgh's neighborhoods and surrounding communities with consistent, focused service.

At this Pittsburgh location, you can send money orders domestically and internationally using Western Union's established network. The branch accepts standard forms of payment and ID verification, and their staff can process orders quickly during business hours. For specific details or to confirm service availability, you can reach the Pittsburgh store directly at +1 412-321-3551.

If you're a Pittsburgh, PA resident or business owner needing to send money domestically or abroad, this Cedar Ave location provides a dedicated resource without the complexity of multi-service branches. Bring a valid ID and payment method when you visit, and plan for minimal wait times during off-peak hours. Western Union Money Order Only has built its reputation on straightforward, reliable money transfer services.
pros: Extensive agent network at Walmart, grocery chains, banks, and retail locations across the US
Money Transfer Control Number (MTCN) tracking system allows both sender and recipient to verify transaction status
Online registration option available to save time at agent counter by pre-initiating transfers
Multiple payment methods accepted: cash, debit card, and credit card at select locations
Money orders serve as trusted alternative to checks and can be deposited directly into bank accounts
No minimum balance or credit check required for prepaid card option
170+ years of operational history and established reputation since 1851
cons: Service fees apply to transfers; costs vary by method, payment option, and destination—comparison shopping required
Agent location hours vary significantly; not all locations operate 24/7 or have consistent schedules
No currency exchange services available at physical agent locations, limiting convenience for international transactions
Website indicates current processing delays for certain international corridors, suggesting reliability concerns on specific routes
Dependence on third-party agent locations means service quality and customer experience varies by individual location
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need cash transfer services without a traditional bank account
Individuals sending money to family or friends domestically or internationally who need physical cash pickup
Customers paying bills at retail locations while shopping and needing convenient in-person payment options
People who prefer cash transactions over checks and need a trusted money order alternative
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers and those needing immediate in-person money transfers or cash pickups, particularly through its extensive retail and bank partner network. The main caveat is that service reliability, hours, and quality depend on individual agent locations, and fees should be compared before sending since costs vary significantly by transfer type and destination.
services: International money transfers with currency conversion
Cash pickup at agent locations using MTCN
Bill payment services (utilities, rent, car payments)
Western Union Prepaid Visa Card issuance
Online transfer initiation with in-person cash payment
Mobile app for money transfer management
Partnership services at banks and retail chains
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 318-320 Cedar Ave, Pittsburgh, PA. Money order services, open 8AM-8PM daily.
